name: Wine of the Prophet
enchantMods: Used when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, if not already in effect
explicitMods: +60 to Maximum Charges
42% increased Charges per use
Grants a random Divination Buff for 20 seconds when Used
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "To proclaim a vision of the future is to make it so,
for those that have the will, and the way!"
- High Templar Andronicus

explicitMods: 131% increased Charges per use

descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

Whether you burn out or explode is up to you.

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: +55 to Strength

flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Foulborn Esh's Mirror

and trembled, and shook,
until she was not what she saw.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills that aren't triggered.

Swiftness grants 15% increased Movement Speed per Momentum lost

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have unholy resonance of lightning, physical and chaos, and to grant unholy resonance of damage types other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 unholy resonance for each damage type. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Lightning, Physical or Chaos cause you to gain 25 Unholy Resonance of the other types per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Unholy Resonance per second of each type you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 7% more Damage per 10 of lowest Unholy Resonance
Supported Skills ignore Enemy Lightning and Chaos Resistance while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Damage
